arts.ttl: How to watch Milan vs Liverpool on TV for free in tonight's Champions League
arts.sum: Liverpool will be looking to bounce back from their shock Premier League loss to Nottingham Forest when they take on AC Milan in their opening Champions League group-stage match

arts.ttl: Why Alexander-Arnold MUST depart Liverpool for Real Madrid
arts.sum: A move to Real Madrid, one of the biggest clubs in world football, would offer a fresh challenge and the chance to prove himself in a different league. Recent reports have suggested that "Real Madrid are already planning their next European era, as they are aiming to sign Rodri, Trent Alexander-Arnold and either William Saliba or Cristian Romero."

arts.ttl: Arne Slot teases Liverpool debut for Federico Chiesa
arts.sum: But supporters had reason to be optimistic about a debut this week when the player's name was part of a 23-strong travelling squad, with Slot since discussing his intentions for Chiesa in Milan. Chiesa's lack of action and training since Italy were knocked out of Euro 2024 in June played a part in that, with Slot approaching his fitness and match readiness with a degree of caution.

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag cites Liverpool example ahead of Man Utd's Carabao Cup opener
arts.sum: Erik ten Hag is determined for Manchester United to take the Carabao Cup seriously, citing Liverpool's victory last season as an example that all clubs want to win the trophy. Ten Hag delivered the Carabao Cup during his first year as United boss in 2022/23, but the competition is often viewed by fans as less prestigious or a lower priority when directly compared to the Premier League, FA Cup or European tournaments.

arts.ttl: AC Milan vs Liverpool LIVE! Champions League match stream, latest team news, lineups, TV, prediction today
arts.sum: Reds looking to bounce back from first defeat under Arne Slot

arts.ttl: Liverpool fan dies after being hit by car in Milan with Champions League ticket in pocket
arts.sum: The 51-year-old Liverpool fan was reportedly fatally struck by a vehicle as he crossed the A4 highway near the Orio al Serio airport in Bergamo, according to Italian outlets

arts.ttl: AC Milan vs Liverpool LIVE: Team news and line-ups as the Champions League returns tonight
arts.sum: Arne Slot takes charge of his first European match since replacing Jurgen Klopp as Liverpool manager

arts.ttl: 'That's the bigger fear': Could 'frustrating' Liverpool losses impact future of key trio?
arts.sum: Man City expert Steven McInerney from Esteemed Kompany suggests to Sports Mole that "a few frustrating defeats" for Liverpool could have an impact on the futures of Mohamed Salah, Virgil van Dijk and Trent Alexander-Arnold following their 1-0 loss to Nottingham Forest.

arts.ttl: ‘Big’: £75m Liverpool player has really helped Arne Slot behind the scenes - Mark Lawrenson
arts.sum: Arne Slot has got off to a strong start to life at Liverpool, winning three of his first four matches as the Reds’ boss. A...

arts.ttl: Al-Nassr SACK Luis Castro following poor start to the season with 'former AC Milan boss Stefano Pioli set to become Cristiano Ronaldo's fourth manager since Saudi Arabia move'
arts.sum: Cristiano Ronaldo has now been through three managers during his time at Al-Nassr with the club announcing that Luis Castro has been dismissed on Tuesday.
